title: ItemStackProMax
description: A utility mod that allows stack size modification.
body:
# ItemStackProMax v1.0.5

A utility mod that allows stack size modification.

## Features

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mRDjQkzh/images/69b13e9a84559d1720a080cc9cfb0511a2a9f58a.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mRDjQkzh/images/d61da8277c7f89bfd235f388148a93aee3a87cc2.png)

> *Set 'ItemStackMaxCount' with the command (OP permission required)*

## Dependencies

- Fabric API

## Configuration

- `~/config/itemstackpromax.json`

> You can actually use commands without restarting the client or server

## Suggestion

- [Staaaaaaaaaaaack](https://modrinth.com/mod/staaaaaaaaaaaack)

> This mod merges the 'ItemEntity' before it is generated  
> Optimized the 'Inventory' explosion

## Credits

- develk - Developer

## Translators

- 简体中文 / Chinese (Simplified)
- English (US)
